overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval town at night. The character moves from narrow cobblestone streets through a town square, passes through a stone archway tunnel, and continues through a muddy outer district following soldiers with torches.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow cobblestone alley passing wooden market stalls

notable_agents.action: woman in brown dress standing near wooden post looking at stall

entered.detail: wooden stall with canvas awning and hanging goods
dark stone wall with wooden beams
medieval half-timbered building with dark wooden beams
simple wooden bench against the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval alleyway lined with stone buildings and canvas market stalls. The cobblestone street is dimly lit by warm torchlight, and a woman in a brown dress stands near a stall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with half-timbered buildings

events.description: exits narrow alley into open town square with timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: walking across the open square toward a large stone archway

notable_agents.action: group of men in medieval clothing conversing near building entrance
woman in pink dress walking across the square

entered.detail: cluster of medieval half-timbered houses with steep roofs
external wooden staircase attached to building
large stone archway tunnel entrance leading to outer district

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley, the scene opens into a wider town square surrounded by timber-framed buildings. Geralt walks toward a prominent stone archway while NPCs mill about the cobblestone square, including a group of men conversing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway tunnel with torch-lit brick walls

events.description: enters dark stone tunnel illuminated by wall-mounted torches
exits tunnel into outer district with muddy ground and wooden fences

agents.ego_description: passing through the stone tunnel and emerging into the outer district

notable_agents.action: soldier in armor holding torch standing guard near tunnel exit

entered.detail: rough brick and stone walls of the tunnel with torch sconces
muddy dirt path with scattered wooden planks
simple wooden picket fence lining the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a dark stone tunnel with brick walls lit by warm torches. After a brief passage, he emerges into an outer district where the ground transitions from cobblestone to muddy dirt, and a soldier with a torch stands guard to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: outer town district with muddy roads and wooden shacks

events.description: begins following two soldiers in red uniforms carrying torches

agents.ego_description: following soldiers through the muddy outer district with wooden shacks

notable_agents.action: two soldiers in red uniforms walking ahead carrying lit torches

entered.detail: crude wooden hut with thatched roof and canvas awning
tall stone tower visible in the distance against night sky
large canvas tent structure near wooden shacks
stack of wooden barrels near the fence
wooden bridge or gate structure spanning the path ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking through the outer district, Geralt follows two soldiers in red uniforms carrying torches along a muddy dirt path. The area features wooden shacks, canvas tents, and scattered wooden planks, with a stone tower visible in the distance and a wooden bridge structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: path passing under wooden bridge in outer district

events.description: passes underneath wooden bridge structure temporarily blocking view of sky

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path past wooden structures and vegetation

notable_agents.action: woman in simple clothing standing near wooden fence

entered.detail: wooden bridge overhead with support beams and planks
small building with straw thatched roof
tall trees and bushes lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches and passes under a wooden bridge structure that temporarily occludes the sky. The path continues past thatched-roof huts and dense vegetation on the left, with wooden fences lining the right side of the muddy trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval town at night, transitioning from narrow stone alleys into a muddy outer district. It begins in a dimly lit alleyway lined with canvas stalls and stone buildings, moving forward until the space opens into a wider town square filled with timber-framed houses and milling NPCs. The camera then follows Geralt through a dark, torch-lit stone tunnel, emerging as the cobblestones give way to a muddy dirt path guarded by soldiers. As the scene shifts into the outer district, the path winds past wooden shacks and canvas tents toward a distant stone tower. Finally, the camera passes under a wooden bridge structure and continues along a muddy trail lined with thatched-roof huts and dense vegetation.
